column275: I launched the production desktop client with standard Chromium/Electron developer-introspection enabled. The application did not block the inspector, and DevTools opened against the running renderer process. I could view application sources, set breakpoints, and observe IPC traffic. I then confirmed that core logic is loaded from an ASAR and that the application still executes after the archive’s contents are changed, indicating missing integrity checks. No exam content was accessed or retained.
